programmes.show_description: This channel is currently off air.
Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues. (HD)
A new face in the wards provides welcome support for Stella, and Mr Middleditch finds out what Carnegie has in store for the hospital. (HD)
In the latest episode of Sport Stories we chat to Roddy Collins. The Rodfather sits down with Tommy Martin to discuss love, family and his tumultuous career. (HD)
Carruth talks about his life inside and outside of the boxing ring. Including that faithful night in 1992, becoming the first Irishman to win an Olympic Gold medal in boxing. (HD)
In a series of 20 half hours, we chronicle the news and highlights of the last 20 years in this archive and music-based series. (SL,HD)
Matron is forced to change her plans after a tragic turn of events, Harper's money-saving schemes cause problems and Jill and Gordon have a disagreement. (SL,HD)
Emma Willis & Tom Allen host with eight celebrities, each paired with an accomplished chef who will mentor, teach and take them from passionate amateur to restaurant level chefs. (HD)
The day-to-day activity of the UCD Veterinary Hospital as we follow a Labrador puppy undergoing heart surgery and investigating an illness in a Ragdoll cat. (HD)
A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country's top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines (HD)
Sydney Airport is one of the busiest transport hubs in the world. Offering unprecedented access behind the scenes and capturing all the drama as it unfolds. (HD)
In the latest episode of Sport Stories we chat to Roddy Collins. The Rodfather sits down with Tommy Martin to discuss love, family and his tumultuous career. (HD)
Alan Quinlan sits down with Joe Molloy to look back at his Ireland career having won 27 caps over a 9 year period. (HD)
DJ Mike Read puts on a dinner party at his home as he plays mystery celebrity host. Will they need to take host Brian McFadden's Poptastic bonus to guess Read's identity? (HD)
Jeremy Wade investigates stories of a colossal fish said to swallow men whole, heading to a remote backwater of Guyana, South America, on a mission to find it. (HD)
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz. (HD)
A man who fathered four children while disabled sues his landlord for allegedly poor living conditions; shopping center owners sue a former tenant. (HD)
Brian Dowling and his fashion-forward design team are on a mission to prove that you can achieve the home renovation of your dreams without it literally costing the earth. (HD)
Love Island UK returns for a twelfth series, offering the ultimate summer of fun, romance and drama. (HD)
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more. (HD)
